title: Hoplite Essentials
body:
![Hoplite Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UpNogxYU/images/9a2a57da6b284991d1e00f5899a786ca6af6965d.png)
# Hoplite Essentials

**Disclaimer!  I am not affiliated with the Hoplite team, and this modpack is not an official Hoplite modpack, you can download the official set of mods on their website [here](https://hoplite.gg/)**

This modpack is tailored toward for Hoplite players!  All mods are in accordance to the Hoplite mod [rules](https://hoplite.gg/rules).

Menu, join Hoplite with a click of a button!

![Hoplite Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UpNogxYU/images/f04c7add29f1704042adc5fadc74f778b058a8fa.png)

Loading screen

![Hoplite Essentials](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UpNogxYU/images/c3c0abdc0339ec7ca3b918ddf9f6d8fc34e7ee66.png)

Enjoy!
